function_descriptions: Involved in pre-mRNA splicing process (PubMed:11991638, PubMed:12084575, PubMed:28076346, PubMed:28502770). As a component of the minor spliceosome, involved in the splicing of U12-type introns in pre-mRNAs (Probable). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:11991638, ECO:0000269|PubMed:12084575, ECO:0000269|PubMed:28076346, ECO:0000269|PubMed:28502770, ECO:0000305|PubMed:33509932}.
